reviews.review_description: @KR Games: You M-U-S-T fix the movement scheme!!  What good is a great FPS if YOU CAN'T MOVE FORWARD.  Fix that ASAP, and I'll edit this review to give it the five stars it so richly deserves. 👍🏻

developer_response.body:
Hi lordkonti, thanks for that! We will be working towards continuous improvement on the game! Stay tuned! 
KR Games

reviews.review_description:
So I was really excited to what the game had to offer and made it no further than the tutorial before being disappointed.  The control with the Go controller is horrible.  Definitely needs game pad control as an option.  Also, the AI needs work. As I attempted to sneak up on the first attacker, he just fired wildly and walked in circles. 
Graphics look great for mobile. I was going to seek a refund, since I can't even play the game but hoping that updates (sooner rather than later) will make this worthwhile.  Until then, it's a 1 star, but will update if changes are forthcoming.

developer_response.body:
Hi whbizlaw, we are sorry to hear that! You can choose between Realistic and Simplified aiming system, which is very helpful to learn how to aim the first time you play. We will be working towards continuous improvement on the game! Stay tuned
KR Games

reviews.review_title: First title I requested a refund for.
reviews.review_description: I like the visual style and story of the game, but the Go just can't keep up the framerate. Every time I turn my head the lag in visual representation of that turn is an uncomfortable experience. Also, I can't possibly aim with either the handgun or the rifle. The gun stays in middle of your vision, but appears to shoot to the side.

developer_response.body:
Hi Azazel08,
we are sorry to hear that! You can choose between Realistic and Simplified aiming system, which is very helpful to learn how to aim the first time you play. 
Commando is a next gen FPS for mobile VR and as such, performance can be improved for sure and we are working hard towards that!
KR Games

reviews.review_description: Yeah I was coming at this game thinking FINALLY A FPS GAME that’s looks somewhat realistic and I thought the controls would be simple and easy and they are TRASH waste of money tbh just make the controls better and aiming more better to the eye and it’ll be a better game

developer_response.body: Hi T2PHoneShawty, we are sorry to hear that! You can choose between Realistic and Simplified aiming system, which is very helpful to learn how to aim the first time you play. We will be working towards continuous improvement on the game! Stay tuned KR Games

reviews.review_description:
I purchased the game thinking this might just be the Project IGI of Go but there are many things that hold it back:

- Movement is difficult. You have to press the touch pad and if you want to turn, you need to turn physically, so you need to stand or be on a revolving chair.

- often I start to aim down sight on the gun by mistake while walking, because pressing the touch pad in the middle does the aiming. I also think a laser ray from the gun would be better for aiming instead.

- Hard to shoot the enemies. I don't know if
I missed a lot of shots or they really take so many bullets. Again, a laser would fix that. Some feedback like blood splatter or voice to tell the player when they get a shot right will be good.

- wasted a lot of ammo trying to pick up guns. Why can't they get picked up automatically when I walk over them?

- font is hard to read.

- AI isn't great, I think the levels could be made in a way that the simplistic AI will not seem too bad.

- I feel it's not optimized and the frame rate is a but low. Anti aliasing could be better at the expense of other graphical details.

- the arms obstruct the view when I move the controller close to my headset. I think just hands is ok, or the arms can fade out when the controller comes close.

I hope this is constructive criticism, I'm a developer myself. I won't be asking for a refund in hopes that an update will come soon as a little these issues are small fixes. Until then I will advise against purchasing.

PS: I believe there are simplified controls available. I'll try them tomorrow and update my review.

Firstly, the visuals and sheer scope of this game is crazy...however this is also its weakness as the framerate desperately struggles at many points in the game. I also found that aiming down the iron sights forced me to look through my left eye, whereas I would naturally look through my right. Some option to rectify this in the menu would be very welcome. However, despite it's problems, this is the first fps on my gear VR I'm truly excited about...huge congratulations to the devs for pulling this off, and I can't wait for furthur updates in the future!!! :)

reviews.review_title: Want to love this, but it's easy to hate
reviews.review_description:
First of all, the voice over guy who does the Arnold impression is terrible, but to the point that it's hilarious, so I'm giving Commando an extra star for that. ("Muh dawterr was da only thing I had left, and dey toowk hur.")

Pros:
- Good graphics, nice detail and level design (I think, I can't find the ammo depot so I haven't made it past the first level. Is there an actual ammo depot? I'm beginning to wonder.)

Cons:
- Almost everything else.
- This game is legitimately unplayable.
- I say that with love.
- I keep trying to play this game. I can't bring myself to delete it off of my GO.
- Commando, the 1985 film starting Arnold Schwarzenegger, which this game (may?) is officially (?) licensed from is an awesome movie. The first time you see Arnold, he's this bearded lumberjack carrying a whole tree trunk on his shoulder. And his daughter is a nine year-old Alyssa Milano. The main heavy is a chainmail-wearing Freddie Mercury looking beefcake named Bennett. Pure, uncut 80s action cheese. 
- Buy this game only to honor that film.
- "You're a funny guy, Sally. I'm going to kill you last." "Matrix, you said you were going to kill me last!" "I LIED!"
Like been said before, the controls is a big problem

Note 9 - GearVR
The graphics for this app are spot on. The idea and gameplay seem great. Everything is excelent, except for the double vision gun. Like I have a gun for each eye (2 right arms), but I can't line up the sights with either eye to get a good aim. Even if I close an eye.... So I'm left with putting my target between the 2 guns, and firing in the hope to hit the target.
Everything in the backround is spot on. Dont have double targets. Just 4 arms and 2 guns. What kinda Crazed FREAK have you turned me into?.. lol

Hi guys,  great game! Did not get great reviews when it first came out.  I decided to try it to see if bugs were fixed and it is working great! I agree that crouching  and running would be awesome!. Keep going guys!!

The graphics, visuals and details are awesome but the controls are terrible and when trying to kill a enemy the shots seem to miss including the knife attack. i think the controls and kills need improvement and if so please add gamepad support with rotation as well. thanks KR games for another great title to add to your library and look forward to you guys releasing more horror games and other awesome content.

developer_response.body:
Hi Aaronb3434, thanks for that! We love what we do and as such we will be working towards improvement as well as keeping on the hard work releasing new games! 
KR Games

reviews.review_description:
The potential for this to become one of the best games for the Go is undeniable. The graphics are absolutely amazing and the levels are definitely designed with care and I believe with our constructive comments we can help make this the best FPS. I would love a less intrusive HUD and smoother walking maybe even a run function. 
I love what you have done so far! Kill the bugs and rock on.

developer_response.body:
Hi lordkonti, thanks for that! We will be working towards continuous improvement on the game! Stay tuned! 
KR Games

reviews.review_description: This is the best single player FPS I have played on the GO so far. I really like the shooting mechanics. Controls are well done... I will comeback to write a complete review once I have finish the game and tested all modes.

developer_response.body:
Hi Purplemikey, many thanks for that! We are glad to hear that you enjoyed playing Commando, this is why we love what we do!
KR Games

reviews.review_description:
This game would be an EXCELLENT game if there was actually an ammo depot. Does anyone have any hints or clues on WHERE THE DAM THING IS?
Seems like the same areas are all a no go. I've played for hours and STILL no depot. HELP ME PLEASE SOMEONE!!!!!
If I ever do fi d the ammo depot I WILL change my stars
Why I cannot finish the tutorial?
This is a really good game, except the fact you cannot properly move forward. Which makes it unplayable. Please fix this issue!

Hello there! I gotta say, all the negative, almost damning reviews Ive seen on here recently had me beyond worried for this game. Im a child of the 80s, so Ive seen Commando the film over 15 times. I wanted this to be so good, and after hearing the game could be possibly broken due to a non-existant objective (in this case an ammo depot) I took this as a personal challenge to find this ammo depot and redeem the game, by any method. First lets look at the other problems mentioned in other previous reviews -

THE AIMING-DOWN-THE-SIGHTS --- yep, this si still broken as already mentioned. HOWEVER, the devs included a LASER SIGHT on the casual aiming setting, so I had zero need for it as most my engagements were medium\close range, and hip firing worked out just fine. Killed every enemy I encountered. WALKING CONTROLS --- Also not bad for me, Ive just played Rest in Pieces and Dont Die, which have the same issues with forward movement getting spotty. Just recalibrate the controller and try to keep in motion.

THE AMMO DEPOT --- Ok, so first thing, kill all the enemies so you got a clear level to run through. Then, equip the compass, you can sprint by holding the trigger while moving which makes this faster. Next, go down to the lower section via one of the stairwells and go to the far opposite corner of the map. Look for a building with an open entry you can walk into, an enemy patrols it, its kinda like a hallway. Inside is a door with graffiti that when looked at shows a key icon. Hit the fire button and itll say its locked, you need to find another depot. Now, run back up any stairs and you gotta cross a bridge to the area just right of the  starting point. Over there is a building with a green flare you can enter. Inside there is like 3-4 assault rifles and a couple pistols. THIS IS THE DEPOT! I walked around until text popped up telling me - there is a prison hidden below, find the door. The door is just outside this building on the outskirts. Level complete!
